category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a test and monitoring tool for Tor Onion Services; official docs say Onionprobe tests and monitors Tor Onion Services at https://tpo.pages.torproject.net/onion-services/onionprobe/.
display_name_sources: Official documentation page title uses Onionprobe at https://tpo.pages.torproject.net/onion-services/onionprobe/; source_facts.name is onionprobe.
docs_sources: Official Tor Project Pages documentation provides Onionprobe intro, installation, and features pages at https://tpo.pages.torproject.net/onion-services/onionprobe/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Tor Project installation documentation gives the Git repository clone URL https://gitlab.torproject.org/tpo/onion-services/onionprobe.
tags_sources: Official Onionprobe docs describe probing onion service endpoints, exporting to Prometheus, and Grafana/Alertmanager support at https://tpo.pages.torproject.net/onion-services/onionprobe/.
